title: Manage mushroom crop development
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage mushroom crop development demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Manage casing application

pcs.text: Select casing materials and recipe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select casing materials and recipe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select casing materials and recipe.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess condition and quality of spawn run before casing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess condition and quality of spawn run before casing.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select product and rate of application where supplement is to be added to substrate at casing, and instruct appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Confirm casing mixture is checked against workplace standards for moisture, structure and depth, and confirm remedial action has been taken if required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm casing mixture is checked against workplace standards for moisture, structure and depth, and confirm remedial action has been taken if required.
